criteria.name: Problem Definition
criteria.description: The student accurately defines the problem, identifying key elements such as input, output, and constraints.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Clearly states the problem, including all necessary parameters and constraints.
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to identify key elements of the problem or misinterprets the problem statement.

criteria.name: Relevance to Sorting & Searching
criteria.description: The student demonstrates an understanding of how the problem relates to sorting and searching algorithms.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Effectively explains how sorting and searching concepts apply to the problem.
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to recognize or explain the connection between the problem and sorting and searching algorithms.

criteria.name: Well-Defined Task
criteria.description: The student translates the ill-defined problem into a well-defined task with clear objectives and requirements.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Produces a well-defined task that is solvable using sorting and searching algorithms.
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to create a solvable task or defines a task that is not relevant to the problem.

typical_errors: Not recognizing the relevance of sorting and searching algorithms

criteria.name: Error Identification
criteria.description: The student accurately identifies errors or gaps in the AI output.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Correctly identifies all errors or gaps in the AI output, including those related to sorting and searching algorithms.
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to identify errors or gaps in the AI output or incorrectly identifies correct output as erroneous.

criteria.name: Analysis of AI Output
criteria.description: The student demonstrates an understanding of the AI output, including any sorting and searching algorithms used.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Provides a clear and accurate analysis of the AI output, including the effectiveness of any sorting and searching algorithms used.
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to demonstrate an understanding of the AI output or the sorting and searching algorithms used.

criteria.name: Relevance to Problem
criteria.description: The student evaluates the AI output in the context of the original problem, considering whether it addresses the key elements and constraints.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Effectively evaluates the AI output in the context of the original problem, considering all key elements and constraints.
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to consider the original problem when evaluating the AI output or neglects key elements and constraints.

typical_errors: Failing to consider the time or space complexity of the AI output
Not evaluating the AI output in the context of the original problem
Incorrectly identifying errors or gaps in the AI output

criteria.name: Correction Commands
criteria.description: The student provides clear and effective correction commands to the AI.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Provides correction commands that are clear, concise, and relevant to the errors or gaps identified in the AI output.
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to provide clear or effective correction commands, or provides commands that are not relevant to the errors or gaps identified.

criteria.name: Sorting & Searching Concepts
criteria.description: The student demonstrates an understanding of sorting and searching concepts when providing correction commands.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Effectively applies sorting and searching concepts when providing correction commands, demonstrating a clear understanding of the algorithms and their limitations.
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to demonstrate an understanding of sorting and searching concepts when providing correction commands, or applies them incorrectly.

criteria.name: Iteration and Refining
criteria.description: The student iteratively refines the correction commands based on the AI output, demonstrating an ability to adapt and improve the solution.
criteria.excellent_indicator: Effectively iterates and refines the correction commands, demonstrating an ability to adapt and improve the solution based on the AI output.
criteria.poor_indicator: Fails to iterate and refine the correction commands, or demonstrates an inability to adapt and improve the solution.

typical_errors: Providing ambiguous or unclear correction commands
Failing to consider the trade-offs between different sorting and searching algorithms
Not iteratively refining the correction commands based on the AI output
